song_name: From The Bottom Of My Broken Heart
version_description: Fully written out and formatted, also correct chord names and placement and proper section names.

versions.song_name: From The Bottom Of My Broken Heart

tuning: E A D G B E

strumming.part: 4/4 parts of the song (if no fingerpicking)

recommended.song_name: Im Not A Girl Not Yet A Woman

content:
ORDER: I V1 PC1 C INT V2 PC2 C FPC FC O


[INTRO]
[ch]Dsus4[/ch] |      |

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] | [ch]Bm7[/ch]  | [ch]Am9[/ch] | [ch]C/D[/ch] |


[VERSE 1]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]Gsus2[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Gsus2[/ch] [ch]C/D[/ch]

Loneliness up  ahead, emptiness behind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Gsus2[/ch]

[PRE-CHORUS 1]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]
And you didn't hear[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Emmaj7[/ch]
All my joy      through my tears[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
All my hopes through my fears[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
Did you know,  still I miss you some - how[/tab]


[CHORUS]

[tab]                   [ch]Am9[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab]                  [ch]Am9[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]C/D[/ch]

[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]
